question: 查询价格最高的两个商品。
pred_sqlplus:
FROM products p
| SELECT p.product_id, p.product_name, p.price
| ORDER p.price DESC
| LIMIT 2

coarse_feedback.message: The SQL executes and row count matches, but result columns do not match the question. Repair only the SELECT projection when possible.

instruction: Repair pred_sqlplus using only non-gold feedback. Do not assume access to gold SQL or gold SQL+.
